name: Euro Coin (EURC)
description: Circle's EUR-backed stablecoin on Stellar mainnet, deployed as a Stellar Asset Contract (SAC). Implements the full SEP-41 token interface. Always redeemable 1:1 for euros under a full-reserve model. MiCA-compliant.

functions.name: transfer
functions.doc: Transfer `amount` EURC from `from` to `to`. Requires authorization from `from`.

params.name: from
params.doc: Source account or contract address.

params.name: to
params.doc: Destination account or contract address.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount in EURC base units (7 decimal places; 1 EURC = 10,000,000).

functions.name: transfer_from
functions.doc: Transfer `amount` EURC from `from` to `to` using a pre-approved allowance. Requires authorization from `spender`.

params.name: spender
params.doc: Address that was granted the allowance.

params.name: from
params.doc: Source account whose allowance is consumed.

params.name: to
params.doc: Destination account or contract address.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount in EURC base units.

functions.name: approve
functions.doc: Approve `spender` to transfer up to `amount` EURC from the caller's balance.

params.name: from
params.doc: Token owner granting the allowance.

params.name: spender
params.doc: Address being granted the allowance.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Maximum transferable amount in EURC base units.

params.name: expiration_ledger
params.doc: Ledger sequence number at which the allowance expires.

functions.name: allowance
functions.doc: Return the remaining allowance that `spender` may transfer from `from`.

params.name: from
params.doc: Token owner.

params.name: spender
params.doc: Approved spender.

outputs.doc: Remaining allowance in EURC base units.

params.name: id
params.doc: Account or contract address to query.

functions.name: decimals
functions.doc: Return the number of decimal places. Always 7 for Stellar-native EURC.

functions.name: total_supply
functions.doc: Return the total EURC supply currently in circulation on Stellar.

outputs.doc: Total supply in EURC base units.

functions.name: mint
functions.doc: Mint `amount` EURC to `to`. Requires admin (Circle issuer) authorization.

params.name: to
params.doc: Recipient of the newly minted EURC.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount to mint in EURC base units.

functions.name: burn
functions.doc: Burn `amount` EURC from `from`. Requires authorization from `from`.

params.name: from
params.doc: Account whose EURC is burned.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount to burn in EURC base units.

functions.name: burn_from
functions.doc: Burn `amount` EURC from `from` using a pre-approved allowance.

params.name: spender
params.doc: Address consuming the allowance.

params.name: from
params.doc: Account whose EURC is burned.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount to burn in EURC base units.

functions.name: clawback
functions.doc: Clawback `amount` EURC from `from`. Only callable by the admin on assets with clawback enabled.

params.name: from
params.doc: Account from which EURC is clawed back.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount to clawback in EURC base units.

functions.name: set_authorized
functions.doc: Set the authorization flag for `id`. Requires admin authorization.

params.name: id
params.doc: Account whose authorization flag is being set.

params.name: authorize
params.doc: True to authorize, false to deauthorize.

functions.name: authorized
functions.doc: Return whether `id` is authorized to hold and transfer EURC.

params.name: id
params.doc: Account to query.

functions.name: set_admin
functions.doc: Transfer admin rights to `new_admin`. Requires current admin authorization.

params.name: new_admin
params.doc: Address that will become the new admin.
